# Register all 66 auto-generated dashboard routes in Screen Registry

## Context

Dashboard routes are real navigable pages even though most are under-development. Registering them enables Phase B data seeding to track which dashboards have real data vs placeholder content.

## Decision

Registered all 66 /dashboards/{domain}/{slug} routes generated by DashboardRouteGenerator across 13 domains (finance, sales, marketing, operations, supply-chain, manufacturing, quality, it, hr, customer-experience, compliance, executive, board) as individual screens under 'dashboards' workflow.

## Options Considered

N/A

## Consequences

N/A
